title: Add Board Variables to Notify Automation

posts.author: Tyler33 (Ty Brakefield)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be nice to be able to Notify based on a value from a column.
We currently have a Fourm that requires an email address and would like to respond to the requestors email that we have received the information or status has changes.
We are Un-Able to link our Outlook accounts to Monday.com for the Email Reply function. But Monday.com has a notify email function that already works based only on active users and replies with a Notifications@Monday.com email. Why can’t we use this for a Notify command?

Notify1189×351 15.3 KB

Replace Someone with a drop-down function and allow the use of variables from boards.
